actionCalls.name: Lock_Unassigned_Voucher_Record_for_Update
actionCalls.label: Lock Unassigned Voucher Record for Update

actionCalls.name: Retrieve_Value_from_Platform_Cache_Partition
actionCalls.label: Retrieve Value from Platform Cache Partition

actionCalls.name: Store_Value_in_Platform_Cache_Partition
actionCalls.label: Store Value in Platform Cache Partition

value.stringValue: Lock Unassigned Voucher Record for Update" Apex action has failed.
Retrieve Value from Platform Cache Partition" Apex action has failed.
"Store Value in Platform Cache Partition" Apex action has failed.

Flow.description: Deposit Unassigned Voucher Flow which will Either Issue a voucher or auto-redeem it and then it will publish a Billing Event Platform event in Salesforce and returns a response.
Flow.label: LOY - Deposit Unassigned Voucher

variables.description: Boolean variable to identify if the flow is being invoked internally (in Salesforce itself) or via API
variables.name: internalExecution

variables.description: Deposit code value passed as a parameter.
variables.name: var_DepositCode

variables.description: Membership Number passed as a parameter
variables.name: var_MembershipNumber
